places.name: Bukit Bintang Street Art Alleys
places.description: Cartoon clouds and nature-inspired murals have transformed the streets of Kuala Lumpur.

places.name: Bamboo Playhouse
places.description: A delightful architectural wonder awaits on a lake island in Kuala Lumpur’s oldest park.

places.name: Dharma Realm Guan Yin Sagely Monastery Canteen
places.description: Come for the chanting, stay for the monastical vegan buffet.

places.name: Kuala Lumpur Butterfly Park
places.description: Hang out with thousands of butterflies in one of the world's largest such enclosures.

places.name: BookXcess RexKL
places.description: Kuala Lumpur’s historic single-screen cinema, transformed into a labyrinthine bookstore.

places.name: Sentul Depot
places.description: After being bombed and largely abandoned, this former railway workshop has been transformed into a lively market space.

places.name: National Textile Museum
places.description: An exploration of Malaysian heritage through the lens of traditional textiles.
